categories.name: Breath & calm
categories.description: Breathing exercises and calming breath rituals

categories.name: Rest, sensory & routine
categories.description: Rest, sensory soothing, and routine rituals

moods.name: Anxious / tense
moods.description: Worried, on edge, or physically tight

moods.name: Awesome!
moods.description: Energized, joyful, or on top of the world

activities.title: Belly breathing
activities.description: Hand on stomach, slow deep breaths.

activities.title: Physiological sigh
activities.description: Double inhale through nose, long exhale through mouth.

activities.title: Humming breath
activities.description: Hum on the exhale for 1 minute.

activities.title: Counted breaths
activities.description: Count 10 slow breaths with eyes closed.

activities.title: Cool-down breath
activities.description: Sip air through pursed lips, long exhale.

activities.title: Morning breath ritual
activities.description: Three intentional breaths before getting up.

activities.title: Evening wind-down breath
activities.description: Five slow breaths in bed or on the couch.

activities.title: Lion's breath
activities.description: Inhale, open mouth, stick out tongue, exhale with a ha.

activities.title: Breath with a phrase
activities.description: In: I am here. Out: I let go.

activities.title: Paced walking breath
activities.description: Match steps to inhale/exhale for 2 minutes.

activities.title: Cool cloth + breath
activities.description: Cool water on wrists/face, then slow breathing.

activities.title: Sound bath at home
activities.description: One calming track, eyes closed, just listening.

activities.title: Body scan
activities.description: Notice feet to head, no fixing.

activities.title: 5-4-3-2-1 grounding
activities.description: See, touch, hear, smell, taste (or skip taste).

activities.title: Loving-kindness
activities.description: Wish yourself and someone else well.

activities.title: Mindful tea or water
activities.description: Sip slowly, notice temperature and taste.

activities.title: Label thoughts
activities.description: Planning, worrying — then return to breath.

activities.title: Open awareness
activities.description: Let sounds and sensations come and go.

activities.title: Future-self note
activities.description: One kind sentence to tomorrow's you.

activities.title: Mindful hand wash
activities.description: Feel water, soap, temperature for 60 seconds.

activities.title: Cloud or sky watch
activities.description: Look up for a few minutes.

activities.title: Walking meditation
activities.description: Slow steps, feel feet on ground.

activities.title: Bedtime body check
activities.description: Where am I holding tension? Soften one spot.

activities.title: Cat-cow stretch
activities.description: On hands and knees or seated version.

activities.title: Wall stretch
activities.description: Calves or chest against a wall.

activities.title: Progressive muscle relaxation
activities.description: Tense and release each muscle group.

activities.title: Sunlight break
activities.description: Face the sun safely for 2 minutes.

activities.title: Barefoot grass
activities.description: Two minutes on grass or earth if safe.

activities.title: Photo walk
activities.description: One photo of something beautiful, then put phone away.

activities.title: Stairs climb
activities.description: One flight up and down, own pace.

activities.title: Walk and call
activities.description: Walk while talking to someone you like.

activities.title: Litter pick mini
activities.description: One small bag on a short route.

activities.title: Evening stroll
activities.description: Low light, calm pace before bed.

activities.title: Swim or pool dip
activities.description: Laps or float if you have access.

activities.title: Sports play
activities.description: Shoot hoops, kick ball, frisbee — play, not performance.

activities.title: Active chores burst
activities.description: Vacuum, mop, or yard work with energy.

activities.title: Core trio
activities.description: Dead bug, bird dog, side plank (modified OK).

activities.title: Hum or sing
activities.description: One song, alone or with music.

activities.title: Play an instrument
activities.description: Even 5 minutes of scales or one tune.

activities.title: Voice memo feelings
activities.description: Talk for 60 seconds; skip replay if that helps.

activities.title: Craft micro-project
activities.description: Fold paper, knit one row, LEGO for 10 minutes.

activities.title: Pet an animal
activities.description: Yours or visit a friend's pet mindfully.

activities.title: Self-compassion phrase
activities.description: Say aloud: This is hard; I'm doing my best.

activities.title: Boundary micro-act
activities.description: Mute one channel, delay one reply, say no to one thing.

activities.title: Act of kindness
activities.description: Hold a door, compliment, small help.

activities.title: Warm shower or bath
activities.description: Focus on warmth and water sound.

activities.title: Tidy one surface
activities.description: Clear desk or nightstand for mental space.

activities.title: Sleep prep ritual
activities.description: Dim lights, no screens 15 minutes, same small sequence nightly.
